title: Digital Project Manager — IT Transformation Programme (Contract)
description_raw:
Lorien Resourcing are recruiting a Digital Project Manager to lead an IT digital transformation programme for a UK financial services company. Engaged outside IR35 via your own limited company.

The programme involves migrating legacy core banking systems to a cloud-native Azure microservices architecture and implementing a new CRM platform (Salesforce).

Key responsibilities:
- Lead the digital transformation programme using agile delivery methodology
- Manage a team of 20 developers, cloud architects, and QA engineers
- Produce programme roadmap and report to the Chief Digital Officer
- Coordinate change management activities across 5 business units
- Own the RAID log, risk register, milestone tracker, and programme governance

Profile:
- 8+ years’ digital project management and IT programme delivery
- MSP Practitioner or PRINCE2 Agile
- Strong background in cloud migration (Azure preferred) and CRM implementation

Rate: £550/day outside IR35
Duration: 12 months
Start: 1 August 2026
Location: Leeds (hybrid — 2 days on site)
